codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the prior scrutiny failure. It extends the stopped-entry lifecycle coverage to assert task and tag association persistence on create/readback and adds explicit mismatch rejection coverage for the start+duration!=stop case on both update and create paths, with no new correctness issues found in the reviewed scope.

summary: Reviewed the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, backend-test-worker skill, prior failed review, and both commits e8d0ccd and 7e777e3. The follow-up commit closes the missing VAL-ENTRY-001 task/tag persistence proof and the missing VAL-ENTRY-003 start+duration!=stop rejection proof, so the original scrutiny failure is resolved.
